overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic corporate transit plaza at night. The character moves from a covered walkway beneath an overpass, across a red-carpeted pedestrian promenade with palm trees, and along the facade of a corporate building marked with large red X symbols. The environment features neon lighting, diverse NPCs in futuristic attire, and sleek modern architecture.

events.description: approaching the exit of the covered walkway into the open plaza

agents.ego_description: following a man in a blue jacket and cap through the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: man in blue jacket walking steadily ahead of the camera
woman in orange top walking past the camera on the right

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying a face advertisement on the left wall
concrete ceiling structure with fluorescent tube lighting overhead
smooth concrete wall lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered walkway beneath a transit overpass, characterized by teal carpeting and fluorescent lighting. The camera follows a man in a blue jacket while a woman in an orange top passes by on the right. A large digital billboard is visible on the left wall as the character approaches the exit to a more open area.

crossing the red-paved vehicle drop-off zone marked with bollards

agents.ego_description: crossing the vehicle drive area and continuing toward the main building

large building facade with distinctive red X symbols on white panels
tall palm trees in planters lining the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into a spacious transit plaza with a high ceiling and open sides. The scene features a red carpet path leading toward a corporate building marked with large red X symbols. The character crosses a red-paved vehicle drop-off area marked with bollards while palm trees line the right side of the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade leading to corporate building entrance

events.description: beginning to follow two NPCs with distinctive orange backpacks through the crowd

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowd on the red carpet toward the building entrance

notable_agents.action: two NPCs wearing matching orange backpacks walking ahead in formation
woman in yellow dress walking alongside the path

entered.detail: orange metal railings guiding pedestrian flow on the right side
illuminated glass entrance doors at the base of the corporate building
painted yellow arrows on the ground indicating walking direction

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the red carpet promenade toward the corporate building, now clearly visible with its distinctive red X logos. The crowd density increases as the character follows two NPCs with orange backpacks. Orange railings and yellow directional arrows guide the pedestrian flow toward the building entrance, while palm trees create a landscaped corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exterior walkway with seating areas

events.description: passing by NPCs seated on concrete benches along the building wall
approaching a brighter area at the end of the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the building facade past seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC in light blue medical scrubs standing near the building entrance
several NPCs seated on benches using their phones

entered.detail: modern concrete seating benches along the left wall
automatic glass doors with metal frames at the building entry points
large palm trees in rectangular concrete planters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the building facade, which is now on the right side, featuring the distinctive red X symbols. The red carpet transitions to paved tiles with yellow directional arrows. Concrete benches with seated NPCs and large potted palm trees line the left side. The character approaches a brighter area at the end of the walkway while passing an NPC in medical scrubs near the glass entrance doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, fluorescent-lit transit corridor into a sprawling, neon-accented corporate plaza. It begins within a covered walkway beneath an overpass, following a man in a blue jacket past a digital billboard and teal carpeting. As the character exits the tunnel, the space opens into a spacious plaza where the teal flooring shifts to a red-carpeted promenade lined with palm trees and bollards. The scene then expands as the camera follows the flow of pedestrians and orange railings toward a corporate building marked with large red X symbols. Finally, the path transitions from red carpet to paved tiles with yellow directional arrows, moving along the building's facade past concrete benches and potted palms toward a bright glass entrance.
